title: Philips could be launching a new Hue Sync device, giving you a new way to sync your TV to your smart backlights — but Nanoleaf and Govee got there first
summary: You will almost certainly still need a Philips Hue Bridge to link the lights and camera to one another, but because the system camera-operated, you won't need a Philips Hue Play HDMI Sync Box or Hue Sync TV app subscription , which…
